data.name: State.AddContact.Prompt.EnterLink
data.value: Specify the person's link:

data.name: State.AddContact.Success
data.value: Now wait for the contact to also add you to their list.

data.name: State.AddContact.Notification
data.value: User {0} wants to add you to their contacts.

data.name: State.AddContact.Confirm.Addition
data.value: Confirm the addition (otherwise type /start):

data.name: State.AddContact.Confirm.WorkWith
State.InboundInvite.Confirm.Accept
data.value: Are you sure you want to accept the request? (otherwise type /start)

data.name: State.InboundInvite.Confirm.Decline
data.value: Are you sure you want to decline the request? (otherwise type /start)

data.name: State.OutboundInvite.Confirm.Decline
data.value: Are you sure you want to cancel your request to this person?

data.name: State.EditGroup.Prompt.EnterId
data.value: {0} Specify the group ID to work with:

data.name: State.EditContactGroup.Prompt.EnterIds
data.value: Send the contact ID(s)

data.name: State.EditContactGroup.Confirm.Add
data.value: Are you sure you want to add these contacts to the group?

data.name: State.EditContactGroup.Confirm.Remove
data.value: Are you sure you want to remove these contacts from the group?

data.name: State.RemoveContact.Prompt.EnterIds
data.value: Specify the contact IDs to remove:

data.name: State.RemoveContact.Prompt.EnterIds.Generic
data.value: Please enter one or more contact IDs, separated by spaces.

data.name: State.RemoveContact.Confirm.Removal
data.value: Are you sure you want to remove the following users from your contacts?

data.name: State.RemoveContact.Success
data.value: The removal process is complete.

data.name: State.Mute.Instruction
data.value: To mute a person (you will not receive media from them), you need to specify either their ID or their link.

data.name: State.Mute.Prompt.EnterTime
data.value: To convert seconds to other time units, use the following ratios: 1 minute = 60 seconds, 1 hour = 3600 seconds, 1 day = 86400 seconds. Enter the mute time in seconds or a date in the format YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS:

data.name: State.Mute.Confirm.Final
data.value: Check your decision and confirm it if you are sure this is what you need (otherwise type /start)

data.name: State.Mute.Success
data.value: Mute is set.

data.name: State.Mute.Info.WillBeUnmuted
data.value: The user will be unmuted at {0:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss} (in {1} seconds).

data.name: State.Mute.Info.WillBeUnmutedAt
data.value: The user will be unmuted at {0:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss}.

data.name: State.Mute.Info.Indefinite
data.value: The user will be muted indefinitely.

data.name: State.Unmute.Instruction
data.value: To unmute a person (you will receive media from them again), you need to specify either their ID or their link.

data.name: State.Unmute.Confirm.IsMuted
data.value: The user is muted until: {0} Do you really want to unmute them? If not, type /start

data.name: State.Unmute.Success
data.value: The user is unmuted.

data.name: State.DefaultAction.AutoSendTimeChanged
data.value: The media sending time has been changed to

data.name: State.DefaultAction.AutoSendTimeNotChanged
data.value: The media sending time has not been changed.

data.name: State.DefaultAction.ActionChanged
data.value: The default action has been successfully changed.

data.name: State.DefaultAction.ActionNotChanged
data.value: The default action has not been changed.

data.name: State.DefaultAction.TimeoutMessage
data.value: ⏳ Sending by default...

data.name: State.CanceledByUser
data.value: ❎ Canceled by user

data.name: State.ContactLinks.ConfirmList
State.CreateGroup.Prompt.EnterName
data.value: Come up with a group name and send it to me:

data.name: State.EditGroup.Prompt.EnterId
data.value: Write me the group ID to edit:

data.name: State.EditGroup.Prompt.EnterName
data.value: Write me the new group name:

data.name: State.EditGroup.Prompt.EnterDescription
data.value: Write me the new group description:

data.name: State.DeleteGroup.Prompt.EnterId
data.value: Write me the group ID to delete:

data.name: State.AddDomain.Prompt.EnterDomains
data.value: Enter the domains you want to add

data.name: State.RemoveDomain.Prompt.EnterDomains
data.value: Enter the domains you want to remove

data.name: State.UpdateLink.Confirm.KeepContacts
data.value: Are you sure you want to create a new personal link and keep connections with your current contacts?

data.name: State.UpdateLink.Warning.NewContacts
data.value: Be careful! Actions cannot be undone! All contacts will be deleted! You will get a new link, and you cannot be found by the old one! Are you sure you want to continue?

data.name: State.UpdateLink.Prompt.EnterIds
data.value: Enter the IDs of your contacts

data.name: State.Confirm.ProcessList
State.Success.ItemsProcessed
data.value: Successfully processed: {0}
